name: CYBERLOQ TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
summary: Company History CyberloQ Technologies Inc. (CLOQ, We or the Company) was incorporated in Nevada on February 5, 2008 as Advanced Credit Technologies, Inc. The Company changed its name to CyberloQ Technologies, Inc. on November 20, 2019. The Company has never been the subject of any bankruptcy, receivership or similar proceeding.
